# Changelog

## v0.2.0 &mdash; March 23rd, 2026

Based on mslicer [`db1d6e2`](https://github.com/connorslade/mslicer/commit/db1d6e24d65116119182d70b604c36f8fd8936f5).

- Expose light PWM in slice config
- Fix calculation of nanodlp's `TotalSolidArea`
- Image drawing functions (rectangle, circle)
- Fix numerical precision issues introduced when converting units

## v0.1.0 &mdash; February 22nd, 2026

Based on mslicer [`d7e7852`](https://github.com/connorslade/mslicer/commit/d7e7852352e124e5d4136cda9f83f8b4ab1b067c).

First release!
